title: EKS UI Help System
description: Help text, about section, default paths, and definitions for the EKS UI
about: Engineering Knowledge System (EKS) — Document Processing Dashboard v0.1.0

help.file_load: Load documents from local disk or pipeline data folder. Supported formats: PDF, DGN, DWG, DOCX, XLSX.
help.tree_view: Navigate document hierarchy by project, discipline, and type. Click any node to view its contents.
help.document_list: Displays all discovered documents. Click a row to view details in the right panel. Use column headers to sort.
help.health_score: 6-dimension quality assessment: Completeness (20%), Confidence (15%), Consistency (15%), Timeliness (15%), Accessibility (15%), Structural Completeness (20%). Score range: 0.0–1.0.
help.pipeline: Start the document processing pipeline: scans data folder, parses files, detects structure, scores health, and flags documents for review.
help.review: Manually review flagged documents. Correct metadata, confirm structural elements, and lock documents when review is complete.
help.theme: Toggle between 5 themes: Light, Dark, Sky, Ocean, and Presentation. Selection is saved in your browser.
help.layout: Switch between single-column, two-column, and three-column layouts. Selection is saved in your browser.
help.search: Filter documents by document number, type, or discipline. Press Enter to search.

definitions.document: Engineering document with metadata, revisions, and health score
definitions.health_score: Quality score from 0.0 to 1.0 across 6 dimensions
definitions.document_number: Unique identifier for an engineering document (e.g., DWG-001-A)
definitions.revision: Document revision letter (A, B, C, etc.)
definitions.discipline: Engineering discipline (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Piping, etc.)
definitions.pipeline: Automated workflow: scan → parse → score → review → register
definitions.manual_review: Human review step for documents flagged by the pipeline
